connect.routingprofile.DefaultOutboundQu.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the default outbound queue for the routing profile.

connect.routingprofile.Description.Description: The description of the routing profile.

connect.routingprofile.InstanceArn.Description: The identifier of the Amazon Connect instance.

connect.routingprofile.MediaConcurrencie.Description: The channels agents can handle in the Contact Control Panel (CCP) for this routing profile.

connect.routingprofile.Name.Description: The name of the routing profile.

connect.routingprofile.QueueConfigs.Description: The inbound queues associated with the routing profile. If no queue is added, the agent can make only outbound calls.

connect.routingprofile.Tags.Description: The tags used to organize, track, or control access for this resource. For example, { "tags": {"key1":"value1", "key2":"value2"} }.
